response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal performance phonetically matches the provided lyrics starting from the second verse ('Crossing over many nights'). 2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics utilized for the song performance; manual transcription and translation performed for the outro announcement and visual text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onsets; durations are tightly controlled to match phrasing and handle transitions between the song and the spoken outro.

subtitles.original: いくつもの夜を超えて
subtitles.english: Crossing over many nights,

subtitles.original: 紡いできた 自分らしさ
subtitles.english: I have spun my own way of being.

subtitles.original: 選択したその全てが
subtitles.english: Everything I have chosen...

subtitles.original: 私をまた突き動かす
subtitles.english: ...moves me forward once again.

subtitles.original: 強がってた訳じゃなくて
subtitles.english: It's not that I was acting tough,

subtitles.original: 止まることが怖かったよ
subtitles.english: I was just afraid to stop.

subtitles.original: 迷っていたあの日もきっと
subtitles.english: Even those days I was lost,

subtitles.original: 今のチカラになってるよ
subtitles.english: I'm sure have become the strength I have now.

subtitles.original: 一人きりだと思っても
subtitles.english: Even when I think I am all alone,

subtitles.original: 気づけばそこにある笑顔が
subtitles.english: if I notice, the smiles are there.

subtitles.original: 私といつも一緒に歩いてくれてた
subtitles.english: You have always walked together with me.

subtitles.original: その意味 そのチカラ 絶対に離さない！
subtitles.english: I will never let go of that meaning, that strength!

subtitles.original: 加速していくこの想いは
subtitles.english: This desire that is accelerating...

subtitles.original: いま翼を纏い出す
subtitles.english: ...is now starting to wear wings.

subtitles.original: 私が私でいれる
subtitles.english: Just being able to be myself...

subtitles.original: それだけで十分だから
subtitles.english: ...is enough.

subtitles.original: 逃げないって決めたのは
subtitles.english: The reason I decided not to run away...

subtitles.original: 強くなったからじゃない
subtitles.english: ...is not because I became strong.

subtitles.original: 私を呼ぶその声と
subtitles.english: With that voice that calls me,

subtitles.original: 重ね合った 信じる世界の明日を
subtitles.english: we overlap the tomorrow of the world we believe in.

subtitles.original: 傷つくこと 躊躇ってた
subtitles.english: I was hesitant to get hurt,

subtitles.original: 立ち止まったこともあった
subtitles.english: there were times I stood still.

subtitles.original: そんな時に この背中を
subtitles.english: At such times, you pushed my back,

subtitles.original: 押してくれたその眼差し
subtitles.english: that look in your eyes.

subtitles.original: 迷いながら選んだ道
subtitles.english: The path I chose while lost,

subtitles.original: 間違いさえ真実だと
subtitles.english: even the mistakes are the truth.

subtitles.original: その焔は闇を照らして
subtitles.english: That flame lights up the darkness,

subtitles.original: 私に正しさをくれた
subtitles.english: and gave me righteousness.

subtitles.original: 張り裂けそうに痛んでも
subtitles.english: Even if it hurts until it tears apart,

subtitles.original: この胸に刻んだ勇気が
subtitles.english: this courage carved in my chest...

subtitles.original: 私をいつも支えてくれていたから
subtitles.english: ...has always supported me.

subtitles.original: 今ここに感じ合う
subtitles.english: Now we feel it here together,

subtitles.original: あなたと私の夢
subtitles.english: your and my dream.

subtitles.original: 燃え尽きることの無い夢は
subtitles.english: The dream that never burns out...

subtitles.original: この大空に羽ばたいて
subtitles.english: ...flaps its wings in this great sky.

subtitles.original: 涙さえも輝かせ
subtitles.english: Making even tears shine,

subtitles.original: 誰かの夜を照らしたい
subtitles.english: I want to light up someone's night.

subtitles.original: 逃げないって決めたのは
subtitles.english: The reason I decided not to run away...

subtitles.original: 強くなったからじゃない
subtitles.english: ...is not because I became strong.

subtitles.original: 静かな焔(ほのお)を抱いて
subtitles.english: Embracing the quiet flame,

subtitles.original: 何度だって立ち上がれること知ったから
subtitles.english: I learned that I can get back up no matter how many times.

subtitles.original: たとえ世界が色を失くし
subtitles.english: Even if the world loses its color,

subtitles.original: 光が遠ざかっても
subtitles.english: and the light moves far away...

subtitles.original: この名に刻む焔(ほむら)は
subtitles.english: ...the flame carved into this name...

subtitles.original: あなたと私を繋いで
subtitles.english: ...will connect you and me.

subtitles.original: 逃げないって決めたのは
subtitles.english: The reason I decided not to run away...

subtitles.original: 強くなったからじゃない
subtitles.english: ...is not because I became strong.

subtitles.original: 私を呼ぶその声と
subtitles.english: With that voice that calls me,

subtitles.original: 重ね合った 信じる世界の明日を
subtitles.english: we overlap the tomorrow of the world we believe in.

subtitles.original: この後詳細お知らせ！ まだ帰らないでね！
subtitles.english: [Screen Text: Details announced later! Don't leave yet!]

subtitles.original: 不知火フレア2026 BEMANI楽曲3Dライブ 見てくれて本当にありがとうございました
subtitles.english: Shiranui Flare 2026 BEMANI Song 3D Live. Thank you so much for watching!

subtitles.original: 今回のこのコラボは 本当に生誕ライブを企画する際に最初から決まっていたものではなく
subtitles.english: This collaboration wasn't actually something decided from the beginning when planning the birthday live.

subtitles.original: みんなが声を上げて盛り上げてくれたから 叶った案件なので
subtitles.english: It's a project that came true because everyone spoke up and cheered for it.

subtitles.original: 改めて皆さんに お礼を言わせてください 本当にありがとうございました
subtitles.english: So let me say thank you to everyone once again. Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: よし！ 気になる不知火フレアBEMANIコラボ
subtitles.english: Alright! The much-anticipated Shiranui Flare BEMANI collaboration...

subtitles.original: コラボの詳しい...
subtitles.english: The details of the collaboration...
